task_description: Fix multiple bugs and improve UI: remove unnecessary Train button, format Marshal instructions, fix Recruit fortress bug, add Harvest confirmation popup, fix PoliticsTrack player colors, improve Betray styling, add season-based log history, fix battle flow hotseat bug

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly (tsc -b && vite build). No test framework in the project so build verification is the only automated check. All 5 features implemented and building successfully.
